⚡️
1d
You can also increase the amount for the pre authorization to help prevent it. A lot of the machines default to $10. But if there are places with problems, then you can increase that pre-authorization. Just make sure the population there is aware of it
👍🏼
1
Tracy Sajady
🚀
1d
It’s not usually a problem at all. Just once in awhile and every time the property manager has been very willing to help. The property manager already got full payment from them for me.
👍
1

⚡️
16h ago

I saw a post recently from Zach Iniguez (always on top of it!) about NSF certification - specifically HAHA. As far as I can tell, no HAHA or Sandstar machines are directly listed as NSF compliant.…continue

16h

💡
1
Zachary S
⚡️
16h

Thanks!

Moth Richards
1d ago

Haha Financing when ordering through VendHub?

Hey friends, have you been able to get financing through Haha when you order in Vendhub? The Haha team told me their financing options are only available…continue

👍
❤️
💡
👏
😂
All Comments
2 Comments
Tracy Sajady
🚀
16h
No. I ordered directly through HaHa on my last two machines and used the Affirm option. I got 6 months zero percent interest financing. Can’t beat that!
Tracy Sajady
🚀
16h
But this will only work for a couple of machines, then you’ll need to find another option. Affirm’s criteria aren’t clearly stated but each purchase your options may look drastically different.
Maura Devereux
16h ago

Does anyone have a sample cold email they have used that worked well?

Share your answer
👍
1
👍
❤️
💡
👏
😂
Alexa & Sam Maher
2d ago
Anyone use the Cantaloupe go micro kiosk? We are currently using 365 picomarket but I don’t find 365’s customer service to be worth investing in.
👍
❤️
💡
👏
😂
All Comments
1 Comment
Angelina and Erik Woolf
⚡️
17h
Hate to be the bearer of bad news, but 365 is in the process of acquiring Cantaloupe (deal was supposed to close last year but is now under antitrust review and pushed out to June). Assuming it goes through as planned, a lot of their operations - including customer service - are likely to be consolidated.
Introduce Yourself
Modern Amenities
⚡️
Nov 25, 2025
You’re Not Just Running a Machine—You’re Building a Business

Welcome to Vendingpreneurs—a community for vending machine owners who are serious about turning this into a consistent, scalable, and freeing business.

If you’ve ever felt like you’re on your own—figuring out inventory, placement, route-building, service calls, or scaling—you’re not anymore.

This space is for:

💰 People who want more than a side hustle

🔍 People who are willing to share what’s working (and what’s not)

📈 People who are obsessed with building better systems, routes, and revenue

Let’s kick things off: Drop your answers below 👇

Where are you on your vending journey right now?

What’s one vending win (big or small) you’ve had recently?

What’s one thing you’re hoping to get from this space?

Can’t wait to get to know you and what you're building.

👍

👏
😂
